title: End-to-end smoke: add_episode and search from laptop
userStory: As an operator, I want a one-off script that proves an episode round-trips into Graphiti so that Workstream A is provably done before migration starts.
acceptanceCriteria: Script (Python or curl) POSTs add_episode with sample text 'met Alice at Acme on May 9 to discuss the FDE role' to https://brain.{domain}
Script GETs search_nodes with query 'Acme' and asserts the entity is returned
Re-running the script with 'had coffee with Alice from Acme' links to existing Alice + Acme nodes (no duplicates)
Script lives under migrate/ or scripts/ and is documented in README
